'''Yoland Fee''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] serving the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Master Fee maintained the gardens of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] until the end of [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] ended in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], and the [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] of the Republic betrayed the Jedi Order and issued [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|Contingency]] [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] to the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], commanding them to execute their Jedi commanders. Led by [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] stormed the Temple as [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|Operation: Knightfall]] commenced and Fee was killed in the event.<ref name="TCSWE" />
